vivid/color/text/default.$description: A default text color used for primary text content.

vivid/color/text/muted.$description: A muted text color used for primary text content.

vivid/color/text/disabled.$description: A disabled text color used for non-interactive text content.

vivid/color/text/on-emphasis.$description: A text color used for high contrast content on strong backgrounds or surfaces.

vivid/color/text/warning/on-emphasis.$description: A text color used for high contrast content on strong backgrounds or surfaces.

vivid/color/text/on-inverse.$description: A text color used for high contrast content on dark backgrounds, overlays, or inverse surfaces.

vivid/color/text/primary/strong.$description: A primary text color used to communicate brand presence and highlight key content.

vivid/color/text/primary/default.$description: A primary text color used to communicate brand presence and highlight key content.

vivid/color/text/announcement/strong.$description: An accent text color used to highlight new features, announcements, or secondary branded content.

vivid/color/text/announcement/default.$description: An accent text color used to highlight new features, announcements, or secondary branded content.

vivid/color/text/info/strong.$description: An informational text color used to highlight info states, messages, or emphasis content.

vivid/color/text/info/default.$description: An informational text color used to highlight info states, messages, or emphasis content.

vivid/color/text/danger/strong.$description: A danger text color used to highlight danger states, messages, or emphasis content.

vivid/color/text/danger/default.$description: A danger text color used to highlight danger states, messages, or emphasis content.

vivid/color/text/warning/strong.$description: A warning text color used to highlight warning states, messages, or emphasis content.

vivid/color/text/warning/default.$description: A warning text color used to highlight warning states, messages, or emphasis content.

vivid/color/text/success/strong.$description: A success text color used to highlight success states, messages, or emphasis content.

vivid/color/text/success/default.$description: A success text color used to highlight success states, messages, or emphasis content.
